name: retroboards-browser-evidence
description: Playwright browser-evidence run for RetroBoards Gate A (desktop + mobile capture).

scripts.evidence:dark: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prepare.sh && playwright test server-drafts.spec.ts
scripts.a11y: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prepare.sh && playwright test a11y.spec.ts
